overall.description: A nighttime walk along a stormy suburban street in a video game environment. The camera follows a red pickup truck before a dark SUV passes by, then continues past a single-story house with a porch light on. Wet asphalt reflects the streetlights through the misty atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban residential street with wet pavement

events.description: dark SUV overtakes camera from behind on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the right edge of the wet road following a red pickup truck

notable_agents.action: red pickup truck driving ahead in the same direction with brake lights on
dark SUV passing camera on the left, moving in the same direction

entered.detail: wooden utility pole with power lines running along the right side of the street
tall street lamp casting a bright beam through the misty air
single-story suburban house with white siding and dark roof visible on the right
low brick wall running along the right sidewalk edge
green garbage bins placed near the brick wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet suburban street during a stormy night, following a red pickup truck ahead. A dark SUV overtakes from behind on the left. The street is lined with utility poles and a brick retaining wall runs along the right side, with a single-story house visible beyond it.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, approaching the front entrance of the well-lit house

entered.detail: concrete block wall replacing the brick wall along the sidewalk
grey metal electrical box with warning stickers mounted on the concrete wall
covered front porch of the house with white columns and railings
bright exterior light illuminating the front entrance area
white mailbox post near the sidewalk
metal chain link fence visible at the property boundary

segments.scene_description: Continuing past the brick wall section, the camera approaches the front of the single-story house. A concrete retaining wall and electrical utility box appear on the right. The house's front porch becomes prominent with its light illuminating the entrance area as the camera draws near.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-slicked suburban street that shifts from a view of passing traffic to a close approach of a residential home. It begins by following a red pickup truck through a stormy night, as a dark SUV overtakes from the left amidst a landscape of utility poles and a brick retaining wall. As the camera moves forward, the brick wall gives way to a concrete section and an electrical utility box on the right. The scene then opens up to reveal the front of a single-story house, with the camera drawing closer until the warm glow of the porch light illuminates the entrance area.
